step.name: classify-task
step.action: Classify into one of text-in-image / photorealism / brand-consistent / bulk / illustration.

step.name: pick-model
step.action: Apply rule `model-by-task`. Bulk + budget < $0.005/img → flux-schnell. Brand → sd-lora or flux-kontext.

step.name: build-prompt-template
step.action: Fill all six dimensions of the prompt template. Use placeholders ({{topic}}, {{character}}) for dynamic parts.
step.decision-gate: Any of the six dimensions empty → re-do step 3.

step.name: pipeline-batch
step.input: Volume per day + provider rate limits
step.action: Set concurrency ≤ tier RPM / 60. Set retry_max=2 with exponential backoff. Compute cost_per_image_usd.

step.name: safety-filter
step.action: Enable likeness_block; pick content_filter provider. Add unit test for "image of $famous_person" → refusal.
